migration.title: Yendetsa Tsamba Lanu
migration.currentWebHostInfo: Zambiri za Wosunga wa Intaneti Wamakono
migration.registeredUsername: Dzina la Wogwiritsa Wolemba / Imelo / ID
migration.ftpUsername: Dzina la Wogwiritsa wa FTP / Bwalo la Kuwongolera
migration.ftpPassword: Chinsinsi cha FTP / Bwalo la Kuwongolera
migration.holdingPageQuestion: Ngati tsamba ndi loyenda/lobvuta ndi kusamuka kwakukulu, tingakhazikitse tsamba lochezeranso pa nthawi ya kuyendetsa?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Kodi tsamba ili lili ndi zofunikira zapadera monga Mtundu wa PHP / Mawodulo?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Mukufunanso kuti tikuthandize kuyendetsa kulemba kwa dzina la domeni?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Mukufuna kuti tiyenjezereko maseva a mayina mwachangu tikamalize kuyendetsa deta?
migration.domainRegistryPortal: Portalo ya Kasitomala ya Domain Registry
migration.note1: Kuzaza fomu iyi kudzatsegula tikiti latsopano la dipatimenti yathu ya thandizo kuyamba kuyendetsa kwanu.
migration.note2: Chonde khalani okwanira ndi oona mwathunthu kupewei kuchedwetsa.
migration.note3: Kuyendetsa kwamba kukwanirizidwa mkati mwa maola 48 mpaka 72. Nthawi zambiri kwanalo ngati kuchuluka kwa deta yoyendetsa ndi kwakukulu.
migration.note4: Akaunti yakale ya kusunga iyenera kukhala pa intaneti ndikupezeka tikukuchita kuyendetsa, mukanena kukhala ndi vuto.
migration.note5: Chonde musachite zosintha pa tsamba lanu tikukuchita kuyendetsa, mukanena deta izo sizingakopidwe ku webhoteli yatsopano.
